blockedUrlPatterns.title: Blocked URL patterns
blockedUrlPatterns.description: URL patterns where Claw in Chrome is blocked. Patterns match the hostname and path, use '*' as a wildcard, and ignore case, scheme, and a leading 'www.'.

forceLoginOrgUUID.title: Force login organization UUID
forceLoginOrgUUID.description: Restricts signed-in use to one organization UUID or a JSON-encoded array of organization UUID strings.
